response.global_summary: The video consists of a comedic detective-themed skit featuring three chibi characters, followed by a musical performance where the 3D models of the same characters (Oozora Subaru, Ceres Fauna, and Hakos Baelz) dance and sing to the song '責任集合体' (Sekinin Shuugoutai).

scenes.description: Comedic detective-themed skit featuring chibi characters talking about a case.
The 3D character models perform a choreographed dance and sing to '責任集合体'. Text on-screen identifies the title and composer Masalada.
